decisions.title: Tech Stack: PostgreSQL + Python FastAPI
decisions.rationale: Best fit for rapid development. Familiar, well-documented, strong community support.

decisions.title: Deployment: Cloudflare Pages + Workers
decisions.rationale: Fast global CDN, low cost, no vendor lock-in. Proven reliability for similar projects.

decisions.title: MVP Scope: Beer + Ratings + Origins (Web-First)
decisions.rationale: Ruthlessly scoped to launch in 4-6 weeks. Social, badges, mobile native, monetization deferred.

decisions.title: Frontend: Next.js (TypeScript) with Tailwind CSS
decisions.rationale: Fast iteration, excellent SEO, responsive design, modern tooling.
